note: First run — no LinkedIn profile data available from previous runs. Connection notes will be generated once: (1) the LinkedIn search plan has been executed by the HANDS agent, (2) profile data has been written back to data/linkedin_profiles.json.

strategy.tone: slightly awkward genuine compliment — avoids AI-slop polish

note_types.post_reference: Reference a specific post they made — highest conversion
note_types.headline: Comment on their headline / job title in a non-sycophantic way
note_types.interest: Reference a shared industry interest or local business topic
note_types.generic: Fallback — local business angle only, used when no profile data

anti_patterns: Do not use 'I came across your profile'
Do not use 'I was impressed by'
Do not mention AI or automation
Do not pitch in the connection note — curiosity only
